name: watchshare
description: WatchShare - private rooms for watching a manually shared browser tab together over WebRTC.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,signaling -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w apps/web" "npm run dev -w apps/signaling"
scripts.dev:https: concurrently -n web,signaling -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:https -w apps/web" "npm run dev -w apps/signaling"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared --if-present && npm run build -w apps/signaling && npm run build -w apps/web
